title: rubus × candens
intro: Rubus × candens, also known as a hybrid of raspberries or a raspberry-like plant, is a type of bramble that combines characteristics of multiple Rubus species. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to reduce inflammation and act as an antimicrobial agent, making it useful for treating wounds and infections. The health benefits of Rubus × candens include its potential to lower blood pressure, improve cardiovascular health, and provide antioxidant properties. Herbal preparations of Rubus × candens often take the form of teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal and health-promoting properties.
